parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Enable to disable the capturing of body tracking data. The primary must also be active to receive data.

parameters.name: top
parameters.label: Kinect Azure TOP
parameters.description: The name of the that is connected to the camera.

parameters.name: maxplayers
parameters.label: Max Players
parameters.description: The number of player skeletons that should be tracked by the device. If the camera does not find enough skeletons, then the extra channels will be set to zero.

parameters.name: relbonerotations
parameters.label: Relative Bone Rotations
parameters.description: Include rotation data for all bone in the skeleton. Rotation is measured in degrees around the XYZ axes relative to the bone's parent.

parameters.name: absbonerotations
parameters.label: Absolute Bone Rotations
parameters.description: Include absolute rotation data for all bone in the skeleton. Rotation is measured in degrees around the XYZ axes relative to the world.

parameters.name: bonelengths
parameters.label: Bone Lengths
parameters.description: Include channels for the length of each bone. A bone's length is the distance between a joint and its parent joint. See the for a diagram of the joint heirarchy.

parameters.name: worldspace
parameters.label: World Space Positions
parameters.description: Include channels for the bone's absolute world position in meters.

parameters.name: colorspace
parameters.label: Color Image Positions
parameters.description: Include channels for the skeleton positions in UV coordinates of the Color Image.

parameters.name: depthspace
parameters.label: Depth Image Positions
parameters.description: Include channels for the skeleton positions in UV coordinates of the Depth Image.

parameters.name: aspectcorrectuv
parameters.label: Aspect Correct UVs
parameters.description: Scale the image space positions to that they match the aspect ratio of the corresponding camera.

parameters.name: flipimagev
parameters.label: Mirror Image V Positions
parameters.description: Flip the v coordinate of the image space positions so that 0,0 would be in the top-left corner. This was the default behaviour prior to version 2020.44130.

parameters.name: flipskelu
parameters.label: Mirror U Positions
parameters.description: Mirror's the U coordintate of Color Image Positions and Depth Image Positions above which is useful when those images have been flipped in U (x axis flip like a mirror).

parameters.name: confidence
parameters.label: Bone Confidence
parameters.description: The confidence that the sensor has that a joint's position and rotation is correct. It can be one of the following values:

parameters.name: imuchans
parameters.label: IMU Channels
parameters.description: Include temperature, acceleration and rotation data from the camera's IMU sensor.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
